summary: Exceptional audience recording of the band at their peak, highlighted by a monster Dark Star that rolls into a soaring Morning Dew.
review: The tapes capture the Dead in top form – Jerry’s guitar and Keith’s keyboards shine, especially during an expansive Dark Star that grows “fat and heavy” before melting into a perfect Morning Dew.  Listeners rave about the crystal‑clear audience sound that rivals many soundboard releases, though one user noted occasional streaming glitches.

ai_rating.rationale: The majority of detailed reviews praise both performance (standout Dark Star/Morning Dew) and the superb audience recording; only a single moderate review mentions streaming issues, yielding an overall high rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Listeners describe the tape as crystal‑clear, immersive and better than many soundboard releases; one reviewer reported playback/stream problems but not a loss of audio fidelity.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Only the second half survives, but it delivers a powerful arc – a soaring Dark Star that builds into an uplifting Morning Dew, showcasing the band at their creative peak.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Praised for excellent guitar work and tone throughout the show.
band_member_comments.Keys: Keith's keyboard playing is highlighted as a key strength of the performance.
